name: BioAge Labs, Inc.
business: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing therapeutic product candidates for metabolic diseases by targeting the biology of human aging.
sellsTo: Patients with metabolic diseases, including cardiometabolic disease and ophthalmic conditions such as diabetic macular edema

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing therapeutic product candidates for metabolic diseases by targeting the biology of human aging.

catalysts.event: Full Phase 1 SAD / MAD clinical trial results
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate full Phase 1 SAD / MAD clinical trial results in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiate Phase 2a proof-of-concept trial in patients with obesity and elevated hsCRP
catalysts.sentence: We plan to initiate a Phase 2a proof-of-concept trial in patients with obesity and elevated hsCRP in the first half of 2026, with results anticipated by 2026 year end.

catalysts.event: Initiate Phase 1b/2a proof-of-concept trial in DME
catalysts.sentence: We plan to initiate a Phase 1b/2a proof-of-concept trial in DME in mid-2026 with results anticipated in mid-2027.

catalysts.event: File first IND for APJ program
catalysts.sentence: We intend to file the first Investigational New Drug application (IND) for an APJ program by 2026 year end.

tamClaims.claim: DME affects approximately 1 million patients in the United States
tamClaims.sentence: DME affects approximately 1 million patients in the United States, and current intravitreal therapies face significant unmet need due to high injection burden and a substantial refractory population approximately 45% of patients demonstrate refractoriness to anti-vascular endothelial growth factor (VEGF) therapy.
